query:
SELECT 
  f.id,
  f.leadId,
  f.dataFollowUp,
  f.dataRegistro,
  f.status,
  f.resultado,
  l.nome as leadNome
FROM follow_ups f
LEFT JOIN leads l ON f.leadId = l.id
WHERE f.corretorId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name = 'Guilherme Nunes')
  AND f.status = 'pendente'
  AND DATE(f.dataFollowUp) = CURDATE()
LIMIT 10;
